title: Cho (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cho''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Chi Cho]]''', [[Chairman]] of [[Pantora]]
*'''[[Cho mai]]''', '''[[cho mok]]''', and '''[[cho sun]]''', [[lightsaber]] techniques
*'''[[Form I]]''' [[lightsaber combat]], also known as '''Shii-Cho'''

==Legends==
*'''[[Cho Badeleg]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]
*'''[[Aran Cho]]''', an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]
*'''[[Chi Cho/Legends|Chi Cho]]''', [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] of [[Pantora/Legends|Pantora]]
*'''[[Thracia Cho Leem]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Cho mai/Legends|Cho mai]]''', '''[[Cho mok/Legends|cho mok]]''' and '''[[Cho sun/Legends|cho sun]]''', [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] combat techniques revolving around [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismemberment]]
*'''[[Form I/Legends|Form I]]''' [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], also known as '''Shii-Cho'''

==Real world==
*'''[[Chō]]''', a Japanese voice actor on ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]''

{{Disambig}}
